rationale: The proposed GenAI chatbot can help reduce the ticket load and improve response times, but it's crucial to address compliance and governance concerns, as well as the potential impact on the support team.
financial_considerations: Projected payback within 12 months, based on a 35% reduction in ticket load and associated cost savings
operational_considerations: Potential to reduce ticket load by 35%
Improved response times, from 11 hours to a target of 3 hours
Enhanced customer experience through faster support
people_impact: Potential job losses among support agents, mitigated by retraining and upskilling opportunities
Support team concerns about job security, addressed through transparent communication and change management
compliance_risks: Customer support tickets may contain personal information, requiring robust data protection measures
Need for AI governance policies to ensure compliance with relevant regulations
conditions_for_approval: Implementation of AI governance policies within the next 6 months
Conduct a thorough data protection impact assessment to ensure the chatbot's compliance with relevant regulations
Develop a retraining and upskilling program for support agents to adapt to the new technology
Regular review and assessment of the chatbot's performance and impact on the support team
final_recommendation: Approve the deployment of the GenAI chatbot for first-level support, subject to the specified conditions, to ensure a balanced approach that addresses financial, operational, compliance, and people impact considerations.
